intended_use: AI-Rad Companion (Pulmonary) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and phys
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion (Pulmonary) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and physicians from emergency medicine, specialty care, urgent care, and general practice in the evaluation and assessment of disease of the lungs.
target_condition: lung diseases, including areas with altered Hounsfield values, consolidations, ground glass opacities, and other thoracic pathology
ground_truth: For lung lobe segmentation: manual segmentation annotations. For opacity detection: human reader annotations with interreader variability assessment and Limits of Agreement analysis.
other_metrics: Lung lobe segmentation: DICE coefficients 0.94–0.96 (250 datasets from multiple US and European sites). Opacity region segmentation: 93.0% of opacity percentage (PO) values within 95%-Limits of Agreement compared to human reads (150 datasets from multiple US and European sites). Interreader variability assessed on lung lobe level.
